name: Maggio Capital
description_short: San Diego-based hard money lender offering private, non-traditional mortgages for residential and commercial properties from $50K-$5M+, with same-day approvals and fast closings.
description_long:
Maggio Capital was founded in 2009 and has been originating non-traditional residential and commercial mortgages since 2007. The company is based in San Diego, California, with a principal founder Carl Maggio who has over 25 years of real estate experience dating back to 1997. They leverage a network of investors and lending resources to provide alternative financing solutions outside traditional bank channels.

Maggio Capital specializes in hard money and private money loans secured by real estate across California. Their loan products include fix-and-flip rehab loans, short-term rental loans, primary residence loans, commercial property loans, acquisition loans, and refinance options. They serve both residential and commercial borrowers with loan amounts ranging from $50,000 to $5,000,000+, and claim to work with "any property, any occupancy, any purpose."

The company distinguishes itself through several operational features: no FICO score requirement, no upfront loan fees, same-day approvals, funding in under 10 days on most loans, and direct access to decision-makers without corporate committees. They maintain a 5-star Yelp rating and are licensed by the California Department of Real Estate (Broker License #01883341) and the Nationwide Mortgage Licensing System (NMLS #308757). Client testimonials highlight reliability, professional service, and fast closings on time-sensitive transactions.

As a hard money lender, Maggio Capital serves borrowers who cannot qualify for traditional bank financing due to credit issues, property condition, time constraints, or non-standard loan scenarios. However, hard money loans typically carry higher interest rates and shorter terms than conventional mortgages, making them a premium-priced solution. Borrowers should expect to pay significantly more than traditional financing options in exchange for speed, flexibility, and fewer qualification requirements.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No FICO score requirement — serves borrowers with poor or no credit history
Same-day approvals and funding in under 10 days — significantly faster than traditional lenders
No upfront loan fees — transparent pricing with no hidden application costs
Loan amounts from $50K-$5M+ — accommodates both small and large real estate transactions
Direct access to decision-makers — no corporate loan committees slowing decisions
Licensed by California Department of Real Estate and NMLS — verified regulatory compliance
5-star Yelp rating with multiple client testimonials — demonstrated customer satisfaction
cons: Higher interest rates than traditional mortgages — hard money loans cost significantly more due to risk and speed
Shorter loan terms and often interest-only structure — designed for short-term projects, not long-term homeownership
Collateral-dependent underwriting — property value and condition matter more than borrower creditworthiness, limiting flexibility
Limited to California markets — not available for out-of-state property purchases
Specialized product requiring real estate experience — not suitable for first-time homebuyers seeking traditional mortgages
best_for: Real estate investors doing fix-and-flip projects with short timelines and tight deadlines
Borrowers with poor credit or non-traditional income who don't qualify for bank financing
Commercial property owners needing fast refinancing or acquisition financing
Short-term rental property buyers who need quick closings before competitive offers expire
diagnosis: Maggio Capital is best for real estate investors and borrowers with time-sensitive needs or credit challenges who can afford hard money's premium rates in exchange for speed and flexibility. The main caveat is that hard money loans are significantly more expensive than traditional mortgages and are designed for short-term projects (typically 6 months to 3 years), not long-term homeownership financing.
services: California hard money loans for residential and commercial properties
Fix-and-flip rehab loans for property renovation projects
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 12544 High Bluff Dr Suite 200, San Diego, CA 92130
